title: In time for the holidays, Duke Energy's Share the Light Fund offers bill assistance to Florida customers facing financial hardships

title: Buying These 2 Stocks Is a Good Way to Hedge Against a Market Crash
text: The stock market is volatile, and bear markets are really just a normal event over time. Investors often shift toward investments seen as safe havens during market crashes.

title: Stability Seekers: 7 Low-Volatility Stocks for Uncertain Times
text: At first blush, focusing on low-volatility stocks may appear an overly pessimistic strategy. After all, the benchmark S&P 500 gained almost 8% in the trailing month.

title: Dual Powerhouses: 7 Dividend Stocks Marrying High Yield With High Growth
text: While it's always important to consider passive-income providers, they often lack an underlying growth impetus, which subsequently makes the concept of high-yield dividend growth stocks so compelling. You can get your growth and also enjoy dividend payments.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Sleeper Stocks to Buy Now: November 2023
text: With investors on the hunt for hot deals, undervalued sleeper stocks are seeing a good deal of attention. In fact, of the ones highlighted below, each carries low risk, and the potential for high returns.

title: 3 Safe Stocks to Prep Your Portfolio if You Still Fear the Bear

title: 7 High-Yield Blue Chips Suitable for Any Retiree
text: Before extolling the benefits of high-yield blue-chip stocks, it's important to acknowledge the reality that many investors are feeling. Long-term stock investors have had to muddle through challenging macroeconomic headwinds in 2023.

title: Duke Energy offers customers a new way to help plant trees
text: For every residential customer who signs up for Duke Energy's Renewable Advantage program, the company will plant a tree CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Nov. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Renewable energy now comes with an added bonus -- helping plant trees to benefit the environment.

title: Duke Energy offers more than $425,000 in energy bill assistance to help Hoosier families facing financial hardship
text: Qualifying Duke Energy customers can receive up to a $300 account credit annually Over the last year, Duke Energy has supported more than 2,500 Indiana households with more than $300,000 in energy bill assistance PLAINFIELD, Ind. , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- To help lower energy costs for low-income families this winter, Duke Energy Indiana is making more than $425,000 in financial aid available to eligible customers through the company's Share the Light Fund ®.

title: Utilities may be the best play for a turbulent holiday quarter
text: The S&P 500 NYSEARCA: SPY is expected to post earnings growth for Q4 2023, but that is about the best that can be said. The consensus is for growth, but the bottom has fallen out of the outlook and can be expected to worsen before it gets better.

title: Duke Energy and Piedmont Natural Gas Partner with Regional Better Business Bureaus to Protect Customers from Scams
text: Utility Scam Awareness Day, Nov. 15, stresses how customers can avoid being scam targets 'Screen the Search' campaign theme reflects rise in digital scams CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Nov. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Threatening phone calls, fake webpages and bogus QR codes are among the growing list of tactics used by scammers, and while the methods may differ, the motive is always the same, which is to deprive customers of their money or personal information.

title: Two renewable natural gas facilities now operating in Upper Piedmont, Foothills landfills
text: SISTERS, Ore. , Nov. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- EVENSOL LLC, a renewable energy project developer focusing on biogas and methane mitigation, announces that it has developed two renewable natural gas ("RNG") facilities in North Carolina that are now operational.

title: Duke Energy: A Juicy Yield And A Realistic Path To >10% Annual Returns
text: Duke Energy is a reliable stock with consistent income and safety, making it a stable choice for dividend investors. Despite slow dividend growth, DUK has demonstrated resilience and commitment to future-proofing its operations through investments in renewables and infrastructure. DUK's recent earnings report and solid balance sheet health support its stability and make it an attractive addition to a portfolio.

title: Duke Energy (DUK) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y

title: 7 Utility Stocks to Help You Power Through a Downturn

title: Duke Energy beats profit estimates on higher margins
text: Duke Energy Corp on Thursday beat Wall Street estimates for third-quarter profit, with the company pointing to higher retail margins and so-called rider charges which are added to utility bills to recoup some costs.

title: Duke Energy reports third-quarter 2023 financial results

title: Duke Energy kicks off monthlong campaign providing nearly $400,000 to help fight hunger in South Carolina this holiday season
text: Funds will support more than 60 feeding programs throughout November Effort will spotlight organizations that work to reduce lack of consistent healthy meals across the state GREENVILLE, S.C. , Nov. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- There's a nip in the air, the leaves are changing color and – for many – thoughts rightly begin to turn toward gatherings around holiday dinner tables.
